findings.summary: Official contact channels are not configured.
The privacy policy route returns HTTP 404.
A horizontal bookshelf photo with capture marks is being cropped into the header logo slot.
Secondary gold text reaches only 2.14:1 on the default background and 2.02:1 on the accent background.
The primary navigation omits the service process anchor and the footer omits expected navigation and privacy access.
robots.txt, favicon, sitemap, canonical and sharing metadata remain pending.

limitations: Automated rendered viewport validation could not run because the integrated browser was unavailable.
Manual mobile, tablet and desktop validation remains required before final deployment.
